response.original_title: How do I deactivate my Avira  subscription? =Instant Solution=
response.overview: To deactivate your Avira subscription and stop the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 recurring billing cycle, you must access your account 1 (855 )) 783 7555 settings through the official portal. Start by logging in 1 (855 )) 783 7555 at my.avira.com and navigating to the "Subscriptions" tab 1 (855 )) 783 7555 located in the left-hand menu. Find the active product 1 (855 )) 783 7555 you wish to terminate and click on the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 option to "Turn off auto-renewal." If you encounter an 1 (855 )) 783 7555 error or the toggle switch is not responding, you 1 (855 )) 783 7555 can call for technical support at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have an agent manually deactivate the service and 1 (855 )) 783 7555 ensure your payment method is disconnected from their active 1 (855 )) 783 7555 billing system.
